case_title: DEBRITU MEKONNEN VS. NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEKONNEN, DEBRITU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $11,491.97 PRINCIPAL, $62.97 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,854.94, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
